headline: World Cup Economics: How Much Boost Could The US Get?
summary: Bank of America says the 2026 World Cup could add 0.6% to U.S. GDP this year — and the hiring boost already showed up in May jobs.

raw.headline: World Cup Economics: How Much Boost Could The US Get?

headline: Marriott International Celebrates 10,000 Properties Globally with the Opening of the JW Marriott Ranthambore Resort & Spa
summary: Marriott International, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAR, "Marriott") today announced the opening of its 10,000th property globally, the JW Marriott Ranthambore Resort & Spa, marking a historic milestone for the company as it approaches its 100th anniversary.
